title: Multiplication
summary: Multiplication compresses repeated addition and enables scaling.
claim: Multiplication represents repeated addition or the scaling of one quantity by another.

proof_layers.summary: Multiplication compresses repeated addition and enables scaling.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Equal groups of equal quantity can be counted by repeated addition; multiplication compresses that repeated structure.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Equal groups of equal quantity can be counted by repeated addition; multiplication compresses that repeated structure.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
